queries.text:
let Statuses= datatable(Status:string) [
 "Succeeded"
];
_baseEHQueryLogs
|where isempty(['_DatabaseName']) or DatabaseName in (['_DatabaseName']) 
|where isempty(['_QueryStatus']) or Status in (['_QueryStatus']) // Multiple selection filtering
|where isempty(['_Users']) or User in (['_Users']) // Multiple selection filtering
|where isempty(['_QueryText']) or QueryText contains ['_QueryText'] // Freetext filtering
|where isempty(['_operationId']) or OperationId == ['_operationId'] // Freetext filtering
|where Status in (Statuses)
|extend Application = case (SourceApplication =="PowerBI", "PowerBI", SourceApplication =="Kusto Web Explorer","Kusto Web Explorer", SourceApplication =="Fabric RTA" and (CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.QuickQuery" or CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.QuerySet"), "KQL Query", SourceApplication=="Fabric RTA" and (CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.Dashboards"), "RT Dashboard", SourceApplication=="Unknown", "Unknown", "Other")
|where isempty(['_Application']) or SourceApplication in (['_Application']) // Multiple selection filtering
|union Statuses
|summarize Queries=count()-1 by Status

let Duration=_endTime- _startTime;
 let BinSize=
 case(Duration>=7d,1d,Duration> 1d,1h,Duration> 6h,10m,Duration > 1h ,1m, 1m); 
_baseEHQueryLogs
//|where Timestamp between (bin(_startTime, BinSize) .. bin(_endTime,BinSize)-1tick) // Time range filtering
|where isempty(['_DatabaseName']) or DatabaseName in (['_DatabaseName']) 
|where isempty(['_QueryStatus']) or Status in (['_QueryStatus']) // Multiple selection filtering
|where isempty(['_Users']) or User in (['_Users']) // Multiple selection filtering
|where isempty(['_Application']) or SourceApplication in (['_Application']) // Multiple selection filtering
|where isempty(['_QueryText']) or QueryText contains ['_QueryText'] // Freetext filtering
|where isempty(['_operationId']) or OperationId == ['_operationId'] // Freetext filtering
|extend Application = case (SourceApplication =="PowerBI", "PowerBI", SourceApplication =="Kusto Web Explorer","Kusto Web Explorer", SourceApplication =="Fabric RTA" and (CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.QuickQuery" or CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.QuerySet"), "KQL Query", SourceApplication=="Fabric RTA" and (CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.Dashboards"), "RT Dashboard", SourceApplication=="Unknown", "Unknown", "Other")
|make-series QueriesCount= count() on Timestamp step BinSize by Status
|project-reorder Timestamp, Status, QueriesCount

_baseEHQueryLogs
|where isempty(['_DatabaseName']) or DatabaseName in (['_DatabaseName']) 
| where isempty(['_Users']) or User in (['_Users']) 
| where isempty(['_Application']) or SourceApplication in (['_Application']) 
| where isempty(['_QueryText']) or QueryText contains ['_QueryText'] 
| where isempty(['_operationId']) or OperationId contains ['_operationId'] 
|summarize QueriesCount=count() by tostring(User)
|top 10 by QueriesCount
|where isnotempty( User)

_baseEHQueryLogs
|where isempty(['_DatabaseName']) or DatabaseName in (['_DatabaseName']) 
| where isempty(['_QueryStatus']) or Status in (['_QueryStatus']) // Multiple selection filtering
| where isempty(['_Users']) or User in (['_Users']) // Multiple selection filtering
| where isempty(['_Application']) or SourceApplication in (['_Application']) // Multiple selection filtering
| where isempty(['_QueryText']) or QueryText contains ['_QueryText'] // Freetext filtering
| where isempty(['_operationId']) or OperationId == ['_operationId'] // Freetext filtering
|top 100 by column_ifexists(_TopBy, CpuTimeMs)
|extend ColdStorageAccess=format_bytes(ColdStorageAccessBytes)
|project Timestamp, User, DatabaseName, Duration=DurationMs, CpuTime=CpuTimeMs, ColdStorageAccess, MemoryPeak, Application, QueryText ,Status, FailureReason,OperationId , CorrelationId

let Duration=_endTime- _startTime;
 let BinSize=
 case(Duration>=7d,1d,Duration> 1d,1h,Duration> 6h,10m,Duration > 1h ,1m, 1m); 
_baseEHQueryLogs
//| where Timestamp between (bin(_startTime, BinSize) .. bin(_endTime,BinSize)-1tick) // Remove last sample point for partial days
|where isempty(['_DatabaseName']) or DatabaseName in (['_DatabaseName']) 
| where isempty(['_QueryStatus']) or Status in (['_QueryStatus']) 
| where isempty(['_Users']) or User in (['_Users']) 
| where isempty(['_Application']) or SourceApplication in (['_Application'])
| where isempty(['_QueryText']) or QueryText contains ['_QueryText'] 
| where isempty(['_operationId']) or OperationId == ['_operationId']
|where Status !="Failed"
|extend CacheStorageAccessBytes=CacheHotHitsBytes+CacheColdHitsBytes
|extend ColdStorageAccessBytes=CacheHotMissesBytes+ CacheColdMissesBytes
| where (CacheStorageAccessBytes+ ColdStorageAccessBytes)> 0
|extend CacheHitMissesPerc=tolong(ColdStorageAccessBytes/ (CacheStorageAccessBytes+ ColdStorageAccessBytes))
|make-series CacheHitMissesPerc=avg(CacheHitMissesPerc)*100 on Timestamp step BinSize

let Statuses= datatable(Status:string) [
 "Succeeded"
 ];
_baseEHQueryLogs
| where isempty(['_Users']) or User in (['_Users']) // Multiple selection filtering
| where isempty(['_Application']) or SourceApplication in (['_Application']) // Multiple selection filtering
| where isempty(['_QueryText']) or QueryText contains ['_QueryText'] // Freetext filtering
|where Status in ("Succeeded")
|extend Status=case(Status in ("Failed", "Throttled"), "Failed/Throttled", Status )
|extend Application = case (SourceApplication =="PowerBI", "PowerBI", SourceApplication =="Kusto Web Explorer","Kusto Web Explorer", SourceApplication =="Fabric RTA" and (CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.QuickQuery" or CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.QuerySet"), "KQL Query", SourceApplication=="Fabric RTA" and (CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.Dashboards"), "RT Dashboard", SourceApplication=="Unknown", "Unknown", "Other")
|union Statuses
|summarize Queries=count()-1 by Status

_baseEHQueryLogs
|summarize QUeryCount=count() by Application

_baseEHQueryLogs
|summarize QueriesCount = count() by DatabaseName 
|order by QueriesCount

_baseEHQueryLogs
|summarize QueriesCount=count() by tostring(User)
|top 10 by QueriesCount
|where isnotempty( User)

let Statuses= datatable(Status:string) [
 "Succeeded"
];
_baseEHMetrics
| where MetricName == "IngestionResult"
|extend IngestionResult=MetricSpecificDimensions.IngestionResultDetails
|extend FailureKind=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.FailureKind)
|extend Status=case((IngestionResult !="Success" and FailureKind =="Permanent"), "Failed (Permanent)", IngestionResult =="Success", "Succeeded", "Temp Failure")
|where Status !="Temp Failure"
|union Statuses
|summarize Ingestions=count()-1 by Status

let Duration=_endTime- _startTime;
 let BinSize=
 case(Duration>= 7d,1d,Duration> 1d,1h,Duration> 6h,10m,Duration > 1h ,1m, 1m); 
_baseEHMetrics
| where MetricName == "IngestionResult"
|extend IngestionResult=MetricSpecificDimensions.IngestionResultDetails
|extend FailureKind=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.FailureKind)
|extend Status=case((IngestionResult !="Success" and FailureKind =="Permanent"), "Failed (Permanent)", IngestionResult =="Success", "Succeeded", "Failed (Transient)")
|where Status !="Temp Failure"
|make-series Ingestions= sum(MetricMaxValue) on Timestamp step BinSize by Status
|project-reorder Timestamp,Status, Ingestions

let Duration=_endTime- _startTime;
 let BinSize=
 case(Duration> 7d,1d,Duration> 1d,1h,Duration> 6h,10m,Duration > 1h ,1m, 1m); 
_baseEHMetrics
| where MetricName == "IngestionLatencyInSeconds"
|extend MetricDimensions=MetricSpecificDimensions
|extend Database=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.DatabaseName)
|where Database !="$copilot" and isnotempty(Database)
|extend IngestionKind=tostring(['MetricDimensions']['IngestionKind'])
|where IngestionKind =="Queued Ingestion"
|summarize LatencyInSeconds=round(avg(MetricMaxValue),4) by bin(Timestamp, BinSize)
|project-reorder Timestamp, LatencyInSeconds

let ErrorValue=toreal(999);
let 1Byte=toreal(1);
let 1KB=toreal(pow(1024,1));
let 1MB=toreal(pow(1024,2));
let 1GB=toreal(pow(1024,3)); 
let 1TB=toreal(pow(1024,4)); 
let 1PB=toreal(pow(1024,5));
let VolumeSize=
case(_VolumeSize =="Bytes" , 1Byte,
 _VolumeSize=="KB" , 1KB, 
 _VolumeSize=="MB" , 1MB, 
 _VolumeSize=="GB" , 1GB, 
 _VolumeSize=="TB" , 1TB,
 _VolumeSize=="PB" ,1PB, ErrorValue); 
 _baseEHMetrics
| where MetricName in ( "IngestionVolumeInBytes", "StreamingIngestDataRate")
|extend Type=iff(MetricName =="IngestionVolumeInBytes", "Batch","Streaming")
|extend Database=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.DatabaseName)
|extend Table=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.Table)
|extend TableName=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.TableName)
|extend Table=iff(isnotempty( TableName), TableName, Table)
|where isempty(['_DatabaseName']) or Database in (['_DatabaseName'])
|where isempty(['_TableName']) or Table in (['_TableName'])
|where Database !="$copilot" and isnotempty(Database)
|extend MetricSumValue=MetricSumValue/VolumeSize
|summarize IngestedVolume=sum(MetricSumValue) by Type, Unit= _VolumeSize
|extend IngestedVolume=round (IngestedVolume, 2)
|extend IngestedVolume=tostring(IngestedVolume) 
|extend IngestedVolume= strcat(IngestedVolume, " ",_VolumeSize)
|project IngestedVolume,Type
|order by Type asc

_baseEHMetrics
| where MetricName == "IngestionResult"
|where isempty( _EventhouseName) or ItemId in ( _EventhouseName)
|extend MetricDimensions=MetricSpecificDimensions
|extend Database=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.DatabaseName)
|where Database !="$copilot" and isnotempty(Database)
|extend Table=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.Table)
|extend TableName=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.TableName)
|extend Table=iff(isnotempty( TableName), TableName, Table)
| where isempty(['_DatabaseName']) or Database in (['_DatabaseName'])
| where isempty(['_TableName']) or Table in (['_TableName'])
|extend IngestionResult =tostring(['MetricDimensions']['IngestionResultDetails'])
|extend FailureKind=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.FailureKind)
|extend Status=case((IngestionResult !="Success" and FailureKind =="Permanent"), "Failed (Permanent)", IngestionResult =="Success", "Succeeded", "Temp Failure")
|where Status !="Temp Failure"
|project-reorder Database, Table,Status
|summarize Ingestions=count() by Status

_baseEHMetrics
| where MetricName == "IngestionResult"
|where isempty( _EventhouseName) or ItemId in ( _EventhouseName)
|extend MetricDimensions=MetricSpecificDimensions
|extend Database=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.DatabaseName)
|where Database !="$copilot" and isnotempty(Database)
|extend Table=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.Table)
|extend TableName=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.TableName)
|extend Table=iff(isnotempty( TableName), TableName, Table)
|extend FailureKind=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.FailureKind)
|where FailureKind =="Permanent"
| where isempty(['_DatabaseName']) or Database in (['_DatabaseName'])
| where isempty(['_TableName']) or Table in (['_TableName'])
|extend IngestionResult =tostring(['MetricDimensions']['IngestionResultDetails'])
|where IngestionResult !="Success"
|where FailureKind =="Permanent"
|extend EventhouseName = ItemName
|project Timestamp, EventhouseName,Database, Table, FailureKind, IngestionResult

_baseDataOperations
|where DataOperationKind =="UpdatePolicy"
|summarize CpuTimeMs=sum(CpuTimeMs) by TableName
|top 10 by CpuTimeMs desc

_baseDataOperations
|where DataOperationKind =="MaterializedView"
|summarize CpuTimeMs=sum(CpuTimeMs) by TableName
|extend MaterializedView = TableName
|project MaterializedView, CpuTimeMs
|top 10 by CpuTimeMs

_baseEHCommands
| where EventhouseCommandType != "DataIngestPull" //Ingestions are included in Data Operations 
|summarize CpuTimeMs=sum(CpuTimeMs) by EventhouseCommandType
|project EventhouseCommandType, CpuTimeMs
|top 10 by CpuTimeMs desc

EventhouseIngestionResultsLogs 
 |where Timestamp between (['_startTime'] +totimespan(_utcOffset).. ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset)) // Time range filtering
 |where isempty(['_EventhouseName']) or ItemId in (['_EventhouseName'])
 |where isempty(['_TableName']) or TableName in (['_TableName'])
 |where ResultCode !="Succeeded"
 |where IngestionFailureStatus =="Permanent"
 |project Timestamp, DatabaseName, TableName, Status,ResultCode, IngestionFailureStatus, IngestionErrorDetails, IngestionSourcePath
 |top 100 by Timestamp

let Statuses= datatable(Status:string) [
 "Failed/Throttled"
 ];
 _baseEHQueryLogs
| where isempty(['_Users']) or User in (['_Users']) // Multiple selection filtering
| where isempty(['_Application']) or SourceApplication in (['_Application']) // Multiple selection filtering
| where isempty(['_QueryText']) or QueryText contains ['_QueryText'] // Freetext filtering
|where Status in ("Failed", "Throttled")
|extend Status=case(Status in ("Failed", "Throttled"), "Failed/Throttled", Status )
|extend Application = case (SourceApplication =="PowerBI", "PowerBI", SourceApplication =="Kusto Web Explorer","Kusto Web Explorer", SourceApplication =="Fabric RTA" and (CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.QuickQuery" or CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.QuerySet"), "KQL Query", SourceApplication=="Fabric RTA" and (CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.Dashboards"), "RT Dashboard", SourceApplication=="Unknown", "Unknown", "Other")
|union Statuses
|summarize Queries=count()-1 by Status

];
_baseEHQueryLogs
|where isempty(['_DatabaseName']) or DatabaseName in (['_DatabaseName'])

|where isempty(['_Users']) or User in (['_Users']) // Multiple selection filtering
|where isempty(['_QueryText']) or QueryText contains ['_QueryText'] // Freetext filtering

|where Status in (Statuses)
|extend Application = case (SourceApplication =="PowerBI", "PowerBI", SourceApplication =="Kusto Web Explorer","Kusto Web Explorer", SourceApplication =="Fabric RTA" and (CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.QuickQuery" or CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.QuerySet"), "KQL Query", SourceApplication=="Fabric RTA" and (CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.Dashboards"), "RT Dashboard", SourceApplication=="Unknown", "Unknown", "Other")
|where isempty(['_Application']) or SourceApplication in (['_Application']) // Multiple selection filtering
|union Statuses
|summarize Queries=count()-1 by Status

let Statuses= datatable(Status:string) [
 "Throttled"
];
_baseEHQueryLogs
|where isempty(['_DatabaseName']) or DatabaseName in (['_DatabaseName']) 
|where isempty(['_QueryStatus']) or Status in (['_QueryStatus']) // Multiple selection filtering
|where isempty(['_Users']) or User in (['_Users']) // Multiple selection filtering
|where isempty(['_QueryText']) or QueryText contains ['_QueryText'] // Freetext filtering

|where Status in (Statuses)
|extend Application = case (SourceApplication =="PowerBI", "PowerBI", SourceApplication =="Kusto Web Explorer","Kusto Web Explorer", SourceApplication =="Fabric RTA" and (CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.QuickQuery" or CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.QuerySet"), "KQL Query", SourceApplication=="Fabric RTA" and (CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.Dashboards"), "RT Dashboard", SourceApplication=="Unknown", "Unknown", "Other")
|where isempty(['_Application']) or SourceApplication in (['_Application']) // Multiple selection filtering
|union Statuses

let Statuses= datatable(Status:string) [
 "Succeeded",
 "Failed (Permanent)"
];
_baseEHMetrics
| where MetricName == "IngestionResult"
|extend IngestionResult=MetricSpecificDimensions.IngestionResultDetails
|extend FailureKind=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.FailureKind)
|extend Status=case((IngestionResult !="Success" and FailureKind =="Permanent"), "Failed (Permanent)", IngestionResult =="Success", "Succeeded", "Temp Failure")
|where Status !="Temp Failure"
|union Statuses
|summarize Ingestions=count()-1 by Status

SemanticModelLogs
 | where Timestamp between (['_startTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset) .. ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset))
 | where OperationId != '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'
 | where ItemId != '' and isnotempty(ItemName)
 | summarize arg_max(ItemName, WorkspaceId) by ItemId

// Semantic Model - Execution Metrics - Summary
let OperationTypes = 
SemanticModelLogs
 | where Timestamp between (['_startTime'] +totimespan(_utcOffset).. ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset)) and OperationId has _operationId
 | where OperationId != '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'
 | where ItemId != '' and isnotempty(ItemName)
 | where OperationName == 'ProgressReportBegin' or OperationName == 'QueryBegin'
 | distinct 
 OperationId,
 OperationName;
let ExecutionMetrics = 
SemanticModelLogs
 | where Timestamp between (['_startTime'] +totimespan(_utcOffset).. ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset)) and OperationId has _operationId
 | where OperationId != '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'
 | where ItemId != '' and isnotempty(ItemName)
 | where OperationName == 'ExecutionMetrics'
 | extend 
 e = parse_json(EventText)
 | extend 
 ApplicationName = case(ApplicationName startswith 'PowerBI - Model Change Tracker', 'Power BI - Model Change Tracker', ApplicationName startswith 'Power BI Desktop', 'Power BI Desktop', ApplicationName startswith 'DAX Studio', 'DAX Studio', ApplicationName startswith 'Deployment Utility', 'Deployment Utility', ApplicationName startswith 'PowerBI - ExploreService', 'PowerBI - ExploreService', ApplicationName startswith 'Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio', 'Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio', ApplicationName startswith 'Tabular', 'TabularEditor', ApplicationName startswith 'PowerBI - NaturalLanguageService', 'PowerBI - NaturalLanguageService', ApplicationName startswith 'SQL Server Profiler', 'SQL Server Profiler', ApplicationName startswith 'Web Modeling', 'Web Modeling', ApplicationName)
 | extend // Extend EventText
 ApproximatePeakMemConsumptionKB = toint(e.approximatePeakMemConsumptionKB),
 HasError = iff(toint(e.errorCount)>0, 1, 0),
 CapacityThrottlingMs = toint(e.capacityThrottlingMs),
 TotalCpuTimeMs = toint(e.totalCpuTimeMs),
 TotalDurationMs = toint(e.durationMs),
 ExecutionDelayMs = toint(e.executionDelayMs),
 OperationCount = 1
 | join kind=inner OperationTypes on OperationId;
ExecutionMetrics
 | summarize 
 // Count metrics
 CountOfOperations = sum(OperationCount), 
 CountOfErrors = sum(HasError), 
 // Total metrics
 TotalCpuTime = sum(TotalCpuTimeMs)/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 TotalDuration = sum(TotalDurationMs)/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 TotalApproximatePeakMemConsumption = sum(ApproximatePeakMemConsumptionKB)/_SizeUnitBasedOnKB,
 TotalCapacityThrottling = sum(CapacityThrottlingMs)/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 TotalExecutionDelay = sum(ExecutionDelayMs)/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs
 by 
 Timestamp = Timestamp+totimespan(_utcOffset),
 ExecutingUser,
 ItemId,
 Operation = OperationName1

// Semantic Models - Execution Metrics
let ConvertQueryDialect = (enum: int) { case(enum == -1, 'Unknown', enum == 0, 'MDX', enum == 1, 'DMX', enum == 2, 'SQL', enum == 3, 'DAX', enum == 4, 'JSON', 'NA') };
let ConvertIntendedUsage = (enum: int) { case(enum == 0, 'Default', enum == 1, 'Scheduled', enum == 2, 'Interactive', enum == 3, 'Service', 'NA') };
SemanticModelLogs
 | where Timestamp between (['_startTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset).. ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset)) and OperationId has _operationId
 | where OperationId != '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'
 | where ItemId != '' and isnotempty(ItemName)
 | where OperationName == 'ExecutionMetrics'
 | extend 
 e = parse_json(EventText)
 | extend ApplicationName = case(ApplicationName startswith 'PowerBI - Model Change Tracker', 'Power BI - Model Change Tracker', ApplicationName startswith 'Power BI Desktop', 'Power BI Desktop', ApplicationName startswith 'DAX Studio', 'DAX Studio', ApplicationName startswith 'Deployment Utility', 'Deployment Utility', ApplicationName startswith 'PowerBI - ExploreService', 'PowerBI - ExploreService', ApplicationName startswith 'Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio', 'Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio', ApplicationName startswith 'Tabular', 'TabularEditor', ApplicationName startswith 'PowerBI - NaturalLanguageService', 'PowerBI - NaturalLanguageService', ApplicationName startswith 'SQL Server Profiler', 'SQL Server Profiler', ApplicationName startswith 'Web Modeling', 'Web Modeling', ApplicationName)
 | extend // Extend EventText
 TimeStart = todatetime(e.timeStart)+totimespan(_utcOffset),
 TimeEnd = todatetime(e.timeEnd)+totimespan(_utcOffset),
 ApproximatePeakMemConsumptionKB = toint(e.approximatePeakMemConsumptionKB),
 ExternalQueryExecutionTimeMs = toint(e.externalQueryExecutionTimeMs),
 ExecutionDelayMs = toint(e.executionDelayMs),
 VertipaqJobCpuTimeMs = toint(e.vertipaqJobCpuTimeMs),
 CommandType = tostring(e.commandType),
 ErrorCount = toint(e.errorCount),
 DiscoverType = toint(e.discoverType),
 RefreshParallelism = toint(e.refreshParallelism),
 VertipaqTotalRows = toint(e.vertipaqTotalRows),
 MEngineCpuTimeMs = toint(e.mEngineCpuTimeMs),
 MEnginePeakMemoryKB = toint(e.mEnginePeakMemoryKB),
 TabularConnectionTimeoutMs = toint(e.tabularConnectionTimeoutMs),
 QueryResultRows = toint(e.queryResultRows),
 QueryProcessingCpuTimeMs = toint(e.queryProcessingCpuTimeMs),
 CapacityThrottlingMs = toint(e.capacityThrottlingMs),
 DirectQueryRequestCount = toint(e.directQueryRequestCount),
 DirectQueryTotalRows = toint(e.directQueryTotalRows),
 DatasourceConnectionThrottleTimeMs = toint(e.datasourceConnectionThrottleTimeMs),
 DirectQueryConnectionTimeMs = toint(e.directQueryConnectionTimeMs),
 DirectQueryExecutionTimeMs = toint(e.directQueryExecutionTimeMs),
 DirectQueryIterationTimeMs = toint(e.directQueryIterationTimeMs),
 DirectQueryTotalTimeMs = toint(e.directQueryTotalTimeMs),
 DirectQueryTimeoutMs = toint(e.directQueryTimeoutMs),
 QueryDialect = ConvertQueryDialect(e.queryDialect),
 IntendedUsage = ConvertIntendedUsage(e.intendedUsage),
 Status = iif(e has 'errorCount', 'Failed', 'Succeeded'),
 TotalCpuTimeMs = e.totalCpuTimeMs,
 TotalDurationMs = e.durationMs
 | extend // Extend Application Context
 SemanticModelId = ApplicationContext.DatasetId,
 ReportId = ApplicationContext.Sources.[0].ReportId,
 VisualId = ApplicationContext.Sources.[0].VisualId,
 Operation = ApplicationContext.Sources.[0].Operation,
 ConsumptionMethod = ApplicationContext.Sources.[0].HostProperties.ConsumptionMethod,
 UserSession = ApplicationContext.Sources.[0].HostProperties.UserSession
 | summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by OperationId, CorrelationId // Eliminate duplicates
 | project
 Timestamp = Timestamp+totimespan(_utcOffset),
 //DateKey = bin(Timestamp, 1d)+totimespan(_utcOffset),
 OperationId,
 WorkspaceId,
 ItemId,
 ItemName,
 ApplicationName,
 ReplicaId,
 User,
 ExecutingUser,
 QueryDialect,
 IntendedUsage,
 Status,
 // Extracted EventText properties
 TimeStart = TimeStart+totimespan(_utcOffset),
 TimeEnd = TimeEnd+totimespan(_utcOffset),
 ApproximatePeakMemConsumption = ApproximatePeakMemConsumptionKB/_SizeUnitBasedOnKB,
 ExternalQueryExecutionTime = ExternalQueryExecutionTimeMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 ExecutionDelay = ExecutionDelayMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 VertipaqJobCpuTime = VertipaqJobCpuTimeMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 CommandType,
 ErrorCount,
 DiscoverType,
 RefreshParallelism,
 VertipaqTotalRows,
 MEngineCpuTime = MEngineCpuTimeMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 MEnginePeakMemory = MEnginePeakMemoryKB/_SizeUnitBasedOnKB,
 TabularConnectionTimeout = TabularConnectionTimeoutMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 QueryResultRows,
 QueryProcessingCpuTime = QueryProcessingCpuTimeMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 CapacityThrottling = CapacityThrottlingMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 DirectQueryRequestCount,
 DirectQueryTotalRows,
 DatasourceConnectionThrottleTime = DatasourceConnectionThrottleTimeMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 DirectQueryConnectionTime = DirectQueryConnectionTimeMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 DirectQueryExecutionTime = DirectQueryExecutionTimeMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 DirectQueryIterationTime = DirectQueryIterationTimeMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 DirectQueryTotalTime = DirectQueryTotalTimeMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 DirectQueryTimeout = DirectQueryTimeoutMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 TotalCpuTime = todecimal(TotalCpuTimeMs)/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 TotalDuration = todecimal(TotalDurationMs)/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 // Extracted Application Context
 SemanticModelId = tostring(SemanticModelId),
 ReportId = tostring(ReportId),
 VisualId = tostring(VisualId),
 Operation = tostring(Operation),
 ConsumptionMethod = tostring(ConsumptionMethod),
 UserSession = tostring(UserSession),
 IntendedUsageScenario = 
 case(
 (QueryDialect == 'DAX' and isnotempty(VisualId)), 'DAX Query', 
 (QueryDialect == 'DAX'), 'DAX Query', 
 (QueryDialect == 'MDX'), 'MDX Query', 
 (CommandType == 'Batch' and QueryDialect == 'JSON' and IntendedUsage == 'Interactive'), 'On-Demand Refresh',
 (CommandType == 'Batch' and QueryDialect == 'JSON' and IntendedUsage == 'Scheduled'), 'Scheduled Refresh',
 (CommandType == 'Batch' and QueryDialect == 'JSON'), 'Refresh',
 (ApplicationName == 'Web Modeling'), 'Web Modeling',
 (ApplicationName == 'Web Modeling'), 'Web Modeling',
 "Other"
 )

let base = 
SemanticModelLogs
| where Timestamp between (['_startTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset).. ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset)) and OperationId has _operationId
;let queryBegin = 
base
| where OperationName == 'QueryBegin'
| project 
 ItemId,
 ['Semantic Model'] = ItemName,
 ['Executing User'] = ExecutingUser, 
 StartTime = Timestamp,
 StartStatus = Status,
 OperationDetailName,
 OperationId,
 EventText;
let queryEnd = 
base
| where OperationName == 'QueryEnd'
| project 
 OperationId,
 EndTime = Timestamp,
 EndStatus = Status;
let queryError = 
base
| where OperationName == 'Error'
| project 
 OperationId;
 //ErrorTime = Timestamp,
 //ErrorStatus = Status;
let queryLifecycle =
queryBegin | join kind=leftouter queryEnd on OperationId;
queryLifecycle | join kind=leftouter queryError on OperationId
| extend 
 CurrentStatus = iff(isempty(EndStatus), StartStatus, EndStatus)
| project 
 ['Semantic Model'],
 ItemId,
 ['Executing User'],
 OperationDetailName,
 StartTime,
 EndTime,
 CurrentStatus,
 EventText,
 OperationId
| order by StartTime desc

// SM_Progress_Report
let window = SemanticModelLogs 
| where Timestamp between (['_startTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset).. datetime_add('hour', 7, ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset))) and OperationId has _operationId
| where OperationName in ('ProgressReportBegin', 'ProgressReportCurrent', 'ProgressReportEnd', 'ProgressReportError')
| where OperationDetailName in ('ReadData', 'ExecuteSql', 'CompressSegment', 'TabularRefresh')
| where not(OperationName =='ProgressReportError' and OperationDetailName =='TabularRefresh' and EventText !has 'Internal Error Code')
| extend ObjectName = tostring( split(XmlaObjectPath,'.').[3])
| project 
 EndTime=Timestamp, 
 ItemId,
 OperationId, 
 CorrelationId, 
 OperationDetailName, 
 DurationMs, 
 CpuTimeMs, 
 ObjectCount=ProgressCounter, 
 Status, 
 StatusCode, 
 XmlaObjectPath, 
 ObjectName, 
 EventText,
 ObjectType = case(OperationDetailName in ('ReadData', 'ExecuteSql', 'CompressSegment'), 'Partition',
 EventText contains ' parti' or EventText contains 'osion' or EventText contains 'partycji' or EventText contains 'skaidinio' or EventText contains 'дяла' or EventText contains 'διαμερίσματος' or EventText contains 'nodalījuma' or EventText contains 'oddílu' or EventText contains 'bölümünün' or EventText contains 'พาร์ติชั' or EventText contains '分区' or EventText contains 'パーティション' or EventText contains '파티션', 'Partition',
 EventText contains ' hiera' or EventText contains 'jerar' or EventText contains 'rarchi' or EventText contains 'erarh' or EventText contains 'ιεραρχίας' or EventText contains 'ерарх' or EventText contains 'hiyerarşisinin' or EventText contains 'ลำดับชั้น' or EventText contains '层次' or EventText contains '階層' or EventText contains '계층 구조', 'Hierarchy',
 EventText contains ' calc' or EventText contains 'beräknade' or EventText contains 'berechneten' or EventText contains 'beregne' or EventText contains 'počítaného' or EventText contains 'berekende' or EventText contains 'lasketun' or EventText contains 'izračun' or EventText contains 'apskaičiuotojo' or EventText contains 'obliczeniowej' or EventText contains 'числяе' or EventText contains 'υπολογισμένης' or EventText contains 'aprēķinātās' or EventText contains 'hesaplanmış' or EventText contains 'ารคำน' or EventText contains '算' or EventText contains '계산', 'Calculated column',
 XmlaObjectPath has 'CalculatedTable', 'Calculated Table',
 XmlaObjectPath has 'CalculationGroup', 'Calculation Group',
 OperationDetailName =='TabularRefresh' and split(XmlaObjectPath,'.').[3]=='', 'Relationship', '')
| extend 
 TableName=iif(ObjectType != 'Relationship', split(XmlaObjectPath,'.').[2],''), 
 PartitionName=iif(ObjectType == 'Partition', split(XmlaObjectPath,'.').[3],''),
 StartTime=datetime_add('millisecond', -DurationMs, EndTime)
| parse EventText with * '[MashupCPUTime: ' MashupCPUTime:long ' ms, MashupPeakMemory: ' MashupPeakMemory:long ' KB]'
| parse EventText with * 'Internal Error Code: \'' ErrorHex '\'' *
| extend 
 TableTMID = extract("TableTMID='([0-9]+)'", 1, EventText), 
 PartitionTMID = extract("PartitionTMID='([0-9]+)'", 1, EventText)
;
let TMID = window 
| where EventText has 'TableTMID='| summarize arg_min(StartTime, TableTMID, PartitionTMID) by CorrelationId;
let DataRefresh = window 
| where OperationDetailName != 'CompressSegment'// in ('TabularRefresh')
| summarize 
 //StartTime=iif(isempty(min(StartTime)),min(EndTime), min(StartTime)), 
 StartTime=iif(isempty(min(StartTime)),datetime(null), min(StartTime)), 
 EndTime=arg_max(EndTime, ObjectName, CorrelationId, MashupCPUTime, MashupPeakMemory), 
 DurationMs=sum(DurationMs), 
 CpuTimeMs=sum(CpuTimeMs), 
 ObjectCount=max(ObjectCount), 
 TmObjCount=dcount(XmlaObjectPath), 
 Status=max(Status), 
 StatusCode = min_of(min(StatusCode), 
 toint(min(ErrorHex))) 
 by ItemId, TableName, PartitionName, OperationId, OperationDetailName, ObjectType
| extend 
 ObjectCount=iff(ObjectType =='Partition', ObjectCount, TmObjCount), 
 ErrorTimeMs=iif(StatusCode <0, datetime_part('millisecond',EndTime), toint(''))
| join kind=leftouter TMID on CorrelationId
| project-away TmObjCount, CorrelationId1, StartTime1
;
let PartitionColumn = window | where OperationDetailName == 'CompressSegment'| parse EventText with * '<oii>' columnName '</oii>' *
| summarize 
 arg_min(StartTime, ObjectType, ObjectName, OperationDetailName), 
 EndTime=max(EndTime), 
 DurationMs=sum(DurationMs), 
 CpuTimeMs=sum(CpuTimeMs), 
 ObjectCount=dcount(columnName), 
 Status=max(Status), 
 StatusCode = min(StatusCode) 
 by TableName, PartitionName, OperationId, TableTMID, PartitionTMID
;
let CompositeResult = DataRefresh | union PartitionColumn
| extend 
 StartTime,
 EndTime;
let OperationsToItems = 
SemanticModelLogs
 | where OperationId != '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'
 | where ItemId != '' and isnotempty(ItemName)
 | distinct ItemId, OperationId
| join kind=inner CompositeResult on OperationId
| project-away OperationId1, ItemId1
;
let Items = _baseSMItems
| join kind=inner OperationsToItems on ItemId;
Items
| project 
 ItemId,
 ItemName,
 OperationId,
 TableName,
 PartitionName,
 OperationDetailName,
 ObjectType,
 StartTime = StartTime+totimespan(_utcOffset),
 EndTime = EndTime+totimespan(_utcOffset),
 ObjectName,
 CorrelationId,
 MashupCPUTime = MashupCPUTime/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 MashupPeakMemory = MashupPeakMemory/_SizeUnitBasedOnKB,
 Duration = DurationMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 CpuTime = CpuTimeMs/_TimeUnitBasedOnMs,
 ObjectCount,
 Status,
 StatusCode;

SemanticModelLogs 
| where Timestamp between (['_startTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset).. ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset)) and OperationId has _operationId
| where OperationName in ('ProgressReportBegin')
| where isnotempty(ExecutingUser) or ExecutingUser != ''
| where ExecutingUser != 'Power BI Service'
| where ItemId != '' and isnotempty(ItemName)
| summarize 
 StartTime = min(Timestamp)
 by ExecutingUser, ItemId, ItemName, OperationId

EventhouseMetrics
|where Timestamp between (['_startTime'] +totimespan(_utcOffset).. ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset)) // Time range filtering
|where isempty(['_EventhouseName']) or ItemId in (['_EventhouseName'])
|extend Timestamp++totimespan(_utcOffset)

EventhouseDataOperationLogs
|where Timestamp between (['_startTime'] +totimespan(_utcOffset).. ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset)) // Time range filtering
|where isempty(['_EventhouseName']) or ItemId in (['_EventhouseName'])
|extend CpuTimeMs=totimespan(CpuTimeMs*10000)
|extend Timestamp++totimespan(_utcOffset)

EventhouseCommandLogs
|where Timestamp between (['_startTime'] +totimespan(_utcOffset).. ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset)) // Time range filtering
|where isempty(['_EventhouseName']) or ItemId in (['_EventhouseName'])
|extend CpuTimeMs=totimespan(CpuTimeMs*10000)
|extend Timestamp++totimespan(_utcOffset)

let Duration=_endTime- _startTime;
let BinSize= case(Duration>= 7d,1d,Duration> 1d,1h,Duration> 6h,10m,Duration > 1h ,1m, 1sec); //Dynamic display of time bins depending on the Time rage of the query
EventhouseQueryLogs
|where Timestamp between (['_startTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset) .. ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset)) // Time range filtering
|where isempty(['_EventhouseName']) or ItemId in (['_EventhouseName']) 
|extend UPN=Identity.claims.upn , AppId=Identity.claims.AppId
|extend User=iff(isempty(UPN), AppId, UPN), PrincipalUserType=iff(isempty(UPN), "Application", "User")
|extend CacheStorageAccessBytes=CacheHotHitsBytes+CacheColdHitsBytes
|extend ColdStorageAccessBytes=CacheHotMissesBytes+ CacheColdMissesBytes
|extend MemoryPeak=format_bytes(MemoryPeakBytes)
|extend CpuTimeMs=totimespan(CpuTimeMs*10000)
|extend Duration =totimespan(DurationMs*10000)
|extend FailureReason= iff(FailureReason =="[none]", "",FailureReason)
 |extend Application = case (
SourceApplication startswith "PowerBI", "PowerBI" ,
CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.Query", "KQL QuerySet", 
CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.Dashboards", "Real-time Dashboard", 
CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.KWE.Dashboards", "ADX Dashboard", 
CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.DataExploration", "Fabric Data Exploration", 
CorrelationId startswith "KD2RunQuery", "SDK" , 
CorrelationId startswith "DataActivator", "Data Activator" ,
SourceApplication startswith "Kusto.Web.KWE","Kusto Web Explorer", 
SourceApplication startswith "Kusto.Explorer", "Kusto Explorer",
CorrelationId startswith "DN.MaterializedViews", "Materialized Views query", 
CorrelationId startswith "Kusto.Web.RTA.Ingestion", "Ingestion query",
CorrelationId startswith "ADF.ControlCommand", "Azure Data Factory",
CorrelationId startswith "AzureDataFactory", "Azure Data Factory",
SourceApplication startswith "Kusto.Flow", "Flow query",
SourceApplication contains "AISkill" ,"Fabric AI Skill",
CorrelationId startswith "KustoWebV2","Fabric metadata query",
SourceApplication contains "Fabric.Kqlmagic" or CorrelationId startswith "Fabric.Kqlmagic" , "Fabric Notebooks",
SourceApplication contains "Fabric.Spark" or CorrelationId startswith "Fabric.Spark", "Fabric Notebooks", 
SourceApplication contains "TridentNotebook", "Fabric Notebooks", 
SourceApplication contains "Spark" , "Notebooks (outside Fabric)", 
SourceApplication contains "Kqlmagic" , "Notebooks (outside Fabric)", 
SourceApplication contains "Jupyter" , "Notebooks (outside Fabric)", 
SourceApplication contains "Jupyter", "Jupyter Notebook", 
SourceApplication contains "Spark", "Spark Connector", 
SourceApplication contains "Grafana", "Grafana",
SourceApplication contains "Kqlmagic", "Kqlmagic", 
SourceApplication contains "jarvis", "Jarvis Dashboard", 
SourceApplication contains "AISkill" ,"Fabric AI Skill",
 "Unknown")
|extend Timestamp+totimespan(_utcOffset)

// Mirrored Database Table Execution Logs
MirroredDatabaseTableExecutionLogs
| where Timestamp between (['_startTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset).. ['_endTime']+totimespan(_utcOffset))
| extend 
 HasError = iif(isnull(ErrorType) or ErrorType == "", 0, 1),
 Identity = tostring(Identity)

_baseSMItems
| project ItemId, ItemName
| order by ItemName asc

_baseSMExecutionMetrics
| where ExecutingUser != 'Power BI Service'
| distinct 
 User = tostring(ExecutingUser)
| order 
 by User asc

EventhouseMetrics
| where Timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where ItemId !='' and ItemName !=''
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, ItemName) by ItemId
|project ItemId, ItemName
| order by ItemName asc

let tables1=_baseEHMetrics
|where MetricName in ("IngestionResult", "IngestionVolumeInBytes", "StreamingIngestDataRate ")
|extend DatabaseId=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.DatabaseId)
|extend Database=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.DatabaseName)
|where isempty(['_DatabaseName']) or Database in (['_DatabaseName']) 
|extend Table=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.Table)
|extend TableName=tostring(MetricSpecificDimensions.TableName)
|extend Table=iff(isnotempty( TableName), TableName, Table)
|where Table !startswith "$" and isnotempty( Table)
|where Database !="$copilot" and isnotempty( Database) and Database != DatabaseId
|distinct Table
;
let tables2=_baseDataOperations
|where isempty(['_DatabaseName']) or DatabaseName in (['_DatabaseName']) 
|where TableName !startswith "$" and isnotempty( TableName)
|distinct Table=TableName
;
union tables1, tables2
|distinct Table
|order by Table asc

_baseEHQueryLogs
|distinct User=tostring(User)
|order by User asc

_baseEHQueryLogs
|distinct Application
|order by Application asc
